name: SFTP
description: SFTP: This node download the file from SFTP location to target location.

fields.name: sftpRemoteLocation
fields.title: SFTP Remote Location
fields.description: User directory path (File take from), File type can be zip, csv, xlsx, pdf etc in SFTP location.

fields.name: targetLocation
fields.title: Target Path, it can be local, s3, adls, gcp and hdfs.
